loading_page_desc: Sorry, an error occurred while loading the page. Please try again.

network.title: Connection Issue
network.message: It seems you are offline. Please check your internet connection and try again.
network.help: Make sure your Wi-Fi or mobile data is turned on.

timeout.title: Request Timed Out
timeout.message: The request took too long. The server might be busy or your connection is slow.
timeout.help: Please try again in a few moments.

server.title: Server Error
server.message: We're experiencing some technical difficulties on our end.
server.help: Our team is working on it. Thank you for your patience.

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.message: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
not_found.help: The link might be broken or the page has been moved.

unauthorized.title: Session Expired
unauthorized.message: Please sign in to access this content.
unauthorized.help: Sessions expire automatically for security reasons.

general.title: Something Went Wrong
general.message: An unexpected error occurred. We're brewing up a fix!
general.help: Please refresh the page or try again later.

menu.category_not_found: Sorry, this category is currently unavailable.
menu.load_failed: Failed to load menu. Please try again.

locations.no_results: No stores found in this location.
